user.title: Pick a profile
user.description: Start from a preset for a known kit, or choose Custom to fill everything in manually. You can change every value after setup.

sensors.title: Sensors
sensors.description: Pick the sensors that drive the simulation.

panel.title: Solar panels
panel.description: Initial values for the panel sliders. You can edit them live from the dashboard later.

get_dashboard.name: Get dashboard YAML
get_dashboard.description: Returns a Lovelace dashboard config pre-populated with the entity IDs from your Virtual Solar config entry. Copy the response's `yaml` field into a new dashboard's Raw configuration editor.

init.title: Sensors
init.description: Pick the sensors that drive the simulation. Panel count, panel wattage, battery capacity and system efficiency are now live, edit them from the dashboard.
